7. total_budget – Present, but inconsistent (shows 565 EUR though text mentions 1200 EUR). The inconsistency means it’s not fully aligned or clearly broken down.

Thus, 5 items are fully specified (destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities) out of 7 total.
